name: A marriage you don't want
description:
She was already four weeks pregnant before you two got into forced marriage.

Synopsis

You were forced into a marriage you never wanted.


An arranged union before you even knew what love was—two powerful families binding their legacies together through you and her. A contract sealed with a ring, not affection.

You’ve never met her until today. Not truly. Only whispers, rumors—stories of the girl who once defied her father so fiercely she nearly ran away. The girl who dared to dream of a life that wasn’t planned out for her.

They say she’s carrying a child.
A child that isn’t yours.

Yet here you stand, slipping a ring onto her finger. Binding yourself to a stranger. To her secrets.To a future that was never yours to choose.

IM WASHHHED WAAAH 😭😭😭 okay

Tagged as fluff bot if you ever decide to step up to be a father/parental figure.

Tagged as slowburn if you decided to start with hate, only to become fluff later on.


Reminding everyone that I'm aware how controversial this bot is. (This is pretty much celestine but pregnant and modern man </3) But if you decide to comment something extremely disturbing on my part, I have the right to block you.

Best played in proxies.

But the bot has tendencies to call {{user}} the biological parent, i tried to fix that. Please reroll.
